feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HANA NSE Buffersize per Server in Scale Out Environment
entry.content:
We use the NSE option in some of our SAP HANA databases. Most of them are set up as Scale Up databases.
But we also want to use this feature in our Scale Out systems. So we set up the buffer_cahce_cs max_size per with different values (depending on the size of nse relevant tables/columns/partitions located on the different servers). We didn't find an explizit info, that this parameter can be used in this way - starting with the SPS 08 documentation of parameters, it's explicit documentend. The docu of our version (SPS 07) has only mentioned an information if a perameter can not be set per server.

It seems to be no problem to set the parameter per server. We are confused about the statistics, we see in the view M_BUFFER_CACHE_STATISTICS. The value of "MAX_SIZE" is still the general value. "ALLOCATED_SIZE" and "USED_SIZE" seems to be reflect a change - which doesn't fit to our settings:

Server "U1"
Parameter MAX_SIZE:    90
Statistics - Max_size:     107.374.182.400
Statistics - Alloc_Size:     99.419.976.000
Statistcs - Used_Size:      96.343.946.496
Statistics - Hit_Ratio:       9,98

Server "U2"
Parameter MAX_SIZE:    15
Statistics - Max_size:     107.374.182.400
Statistics - Alloc_Size:      31.656.842.816

entry.title: Agents assistant in s/4 hana
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a lot agents' assistant for Ariba but what agents we have dedicated i S/4 Hana?

I found only one article: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/nexgen-ai-agents-for-sap-s4-hana/ba-p/13983394

but it does not give me any information about technical details or list of all agents for S/4

I try to check also this list: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/ai-catalog/

No resources there. Please help

 

Regards

entry.title: how can I use a cursor on an initially empty, growing table?
entry.content:
I want to walk thru an initially empty table that is filled while doing this. So I constantly add rows to that table while another cursor should catch up. If the catching up cursor reaches the end, the process should stop. Here s some pseudcode in case that wasn't clear: 

:MyTab is an empty table
:ResultTab is an empty table, that I want to walk
:currentValue is something I fetched, starts with a given value
DO {
  EXECUTE IMMEDIATE (something with :currentValue) INTO :MyTab
  /* I might get from 0 to whatever results. */
  Append :MyTab to :ResultTable
  Fetch next :currentValue from :ResultTable
} WHILE (:currentValue is NOT NULL)

 My Problem is: how can I do this? If I declare a cursor, I have to open it outside the loop on the empty table, and will get an invalid result. I tried to play with HOLD but that didnt work. Is it safe to use "$rowid$" here on :ResultTable and just increment?

How would you do it?

entry.title: HANAパラメータ設定
entry.content:
お世話になります。

HANA 2.0 SPS08 Rev89のHANAシステムにパラメータを削除したいのですが、設定後に再起動をするとパラメータが復活してしまいます。

こちらのパラメータの意味と削除する方法はどのようにすればいいのでしょうか？

パラメータ：singletenant = yes

 

よろしくお願いします。

entry.title: Q2C tests
entry.content:
--- Description ---

I intended to download SAP Q2C Benchmark components from the Software Center to conduct Q2C tests. However, it shows no data available after clicking the link. Could you please advise the possible causes?


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. Search for benchmark, the download link of SAP Q2C Benchmark components is displayed.
  2. Click to download that item
  3. shows no data available 
  4.

entry.title: For restricting edit/create options for Ariba purchasing doc type in S4
entry.content:
We have Ariba PRs and POs with document type 'ARB' that gets copied in the S/4HANA. There is a requirement to restrict the creation and modification of Ariba-generated PRs and POs in S/4HANA. Most of the standard Fiori apps used for creation or changes of PRs/ POs have been restricted by the security team using authorization objects - M_BEST_BSA ; however, for the remaining four applications (listed below), the security team is unable to enforce restrictions due to the lack of authorization control at the document type level. Could you please suggest what can be done for the below apps so that changes to the document type 'ZAR' should be restricted.

App nameApp ID
Mass Changes to Purchase RequisitionsF2594
Mass Changes to Purchase OrdersF2593
Monitor Mass Changes – Purchase RequisitionsF4391
Monitor Mass Changes- Purchase orderF3332

entry.title: SQLMD: Cross Node Joins Analysis
entry.content:
When executing SQLMD for Cross Node Join analysis, the program needs an input file containing Tables and Nodes. 

How to generate this file using the data from HANA DB? Wherever I check in System tables/views, this field with Node information is marked as Internal Use only and always return empty result.

So, how to generate the file with Table & Node information required to execute SQLMD?

Thanks

entry.title: Table To Track Deletion Records for DD02L and VARI tables
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We are loading data from the DD02L and VARI table from S/4HANA to Datasphere. We can observe that in certain cases the data loaded in the target(Datasphere) is more than the data present in the source (S/4HANA) at a instance of time. The load is executing daily once. 

We assume that there was some record deletion in the source system between the time the data was loaded and the instance when we are checking in the source system. Please let us know where can we see these records from the source system to tally our data integration records.

Thanks

entry.title: the way of cerate index
entry.content: 我们想给acdocp新建一个索引，是否直接在hana studio中执行：1、添加索引：CREATE INDEX SAPHANADB.ACDOCP~AUFNR ON SAPHANADB.ACDOCP (MANDT, AUFNR);  即可？

entry.title: Issue with Inbound Mail Processing in SAP
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are facing an issue related to inbound mail processing in our SAP system.

We have already checked the following points:

  • SCOT configuration
  • SMICM service status
  • SICF service activation
  • User creation in SU01 with user type “System”
  • Network connectivity between SAP and mail server

Earlier, we were facing issues with outgoing mails as well; however, the outbound mail processing is now working properly. Despite all checks being completed successfully and no network issues being observed, inbound mails are still not being processed in SAP.

Request you to please help us identify the root cause and suggest the required solution.

Please let us know if any additional logs, traces, or configuration details are required from our end.

Regards,
Chetan Chavan

entry.title: Document Types Index
entry.content:
Hello,

It looks like this page https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/cbe758a0da7847a59c0cf1a8f595f438.html?locale=en-US related to “Document Types Used in Document Splitting”, is not complete. In fact, the types 6R, R6, R7 among others don’t appear in the list. Is there a possibility to download a list directly from my software? I tried by consulting the tabs “Glossary” and “SAP library”, without results.

 

Do you have any solution?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: We require a Profit Center-wise Plan vs Actual report.
entry.content: Looking for guidance on generating a Profit Center-wise Plan vs Actual report in SAP. Any standard report suggestions or best practices would be appreciated.

entry.title: Unexpected Key 'ID' in Metadata After Adding @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
entry.content:
Getting unexpected key 'ID ' in metadata after adding @DefaultAggregation: #SUM in my cds 

If I remove the @DefaultAggregation: #SUM annotation, the error disappears. However, our business requirements state that we must display the total at the end, so this annotation is necessary. Please let me know if there are any solutions for this issue."

below is my code:
@EndUserText.label: 'Order Cost Analytics'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@vdm.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@ObjectModel.usageType: {
serviceQuality: #X,
sizeCategory: #S,
dataClass: #MIXED
}
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE
@odata.publish: true
define view entity /HCLDC/C_ORDERCOSTREPORTAPP
as select from /HCLDC/I_ORDERCOSTREPORTAPPDET
{
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key DocumentNumber,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 30 }]
key Object,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key MaintenanceNotification,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key ValueCategory,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key MaintenanceOrder,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 50 }]
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key fiscalyear,
DocumentType,
DocumentVersion,
DocumentPart,
ControllingArea,
ObjectType,
MaintPriorityType,
MaintPriority,
MaintenanceProcessingPhase,
MaintObjectLocAcctAssgmtNmbr,
TopOrderNotification,
// @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 80 }]
ValueCategoryDesc,
// @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 90 }]
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
PlanningPlant,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
// @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
ActualCost,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
// @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
PlannedCost,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
// @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
TasklistCost,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
ApprovalEstCost,
Equipment,
Assembly,
}

entry.title: SAP Business One 9.3 HANA – System Extremely Slow After HANA Server Restart
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are facing a recurring issue in our SAP Business One 9.3 for SAP HANA environment. Our landscape consists of a SAP HANA Database Server and SLD Server on SUSE Linux, with the SAP Business One Application Server on Windows Server 2019. For the last few days, the company database is intermittently not visible on the SAP Business One login screen, requiring a restart of the HANA server to restore connectivity. After the restart, users can log in, but the system continues to run extremely slowly, affecting all business operations. This issue occurs almost daily and is impacting productivity. Kindly assist in identifying the root cause and provide recommendations for resolving the performance and connectivity issues at the earliest. Thank you.

entry.title: Call Hana trial ABAP V4 RAP from Vscode / postman
entry.content:
I created a custom RAP V4 service in Hana trial and published it.

When calling from vscode / postman i provided the client credentials from the ABAP service(key etc.).

in Vscode i provided below details for the first call to get token.  

Auth token url

client id 

client secret

when i do get token it gets the token successfully. 

Then next call to call service metadata gives 200 but returns the login page.

 

Any clue what needs to be fixed ?

entry.title: COPA Top-Down Distribution (TDD) Complex Scenario - MANAGE_ALLOCATION
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am configuring a Complex Top-Down Distribution (TDD) cycle in SAP S/4 HANA Margin Analysis (ACDOC_PA) using the Fiori app 'Manage Allocations'. I am facing several warnings and errors and would appreciate your guidance.

BUSINESS REQUIREMENT

I need to allocate overhead costs (account 622260) sitting on Company Code 0001 proportionally based on Net Sales (CA) from multiple Company Codes defined in a group called COPA_STE. The brand dimension WW150_PA = LEGRAND is used to filter both sender and reference data. The reference base is a GL account group called CA4NET.

This is a cross-company code TDD: costs reside on CoCode 0001 but the reference base (sales) comes from multiple company codes (group COPA_STE).

TDD TEMPLATE SETUP

KUNNR (Customer) is set as category D = Distributed — this is the distribution characteristic.
WW150_PA (Brand) is set as category C = Retained and relevant for reference.
RBUKRS (Company Code) is set as category C = Retained and relevant for reference.

CYCLE CONFIGURATION

Allocation Context: ACDOC_PA (Margin Analysis)
Ledger: 0L
Allocation Type: C (TOP DOWN DISTRIBUTION)
Actual/Plan: I (Actual)
Transaction Currency: X

Rules:
- Sender Rule: 1 (Posted Amounts)
- Receiver Rule: 1 (Variable Portions)
- Var. Portion Type: TSL-0 (Actual Transaction Currency)
- Scale Neg. Factors: 1

Sender Details (3 criteria):
- RACCT = Single Value 622260
- RBUKRS = Single Value 0001
- WW150_PA = Single Value LEGRAND

Receivers (1 criterion):
- KUNNR = Interval 1 to 9999999999

Receiver Basis - Selection Criteria (3 criteria):
- RACCT = Initial (empty)
- RBUKRS = Group COPA_STE
- WW150_PA = Single Value LEGRAND

Receiver Basis - Reference Base Mapping for RACCT:
- Sender Data: Single Value 622260
- Reference Data: Group CA4NET

ISSUES ENCOUNTERED

1. Error MANAGE_ALLOC/078: Too many inputs for Single Value, Interval and Group Value.
→ Occurred when RACCT had a value in both Selection Criteria AND Reference Base Mapping simultaneously.
→ Fixed by setting RACCT to Initial in Selection Criteria and keeping the mapping only in Reference Base Mapping.

→ Result: 0 result records generated and several warnings

Thank you a lot for your help !

entry.title: TST03 Table space issue
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have reached disk space utilization to 80%, when identifying we found TST03 table consumes more space. We have deleted some old spool requests then the table space is reduced by 25GB; however the disk utilization is reduced by only 1GB.

How can we reclaim the remaining 24GB space to minimize disk space utilization?

entry.title: RSP Instance Backup Failure in hana 9.3
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are facing an issue with RSP Instance Backup in our SAP Business One HANA environment.

RSP backups are enabled and running.
Full backup jobs are completing successfully.
However, several Instance Backup jobs are failing.
The failed jobs are showing "DB Backup" status and generating 0 B backup files.

Kindly help us understand the possible cause of this issue and advise on the troubleshooting steps. Please let us know which logs or diagnostic information are required from our end for further analysis.

A screenshot of the backup history showing the failed Instance Backup jobs has been attached for your reference.

entry.title: Steps to code on how to integrate the call for the digital signature to customer after all checks
entry.content: Please provide the steps to code on how to integrate the call for the digital signature to customer after all checks are done on submit/approval step in MDG in sap abap S4 HANA

entry.title: Please help me to get my article published.
entry.content:
Hello @jerryjanda @mynynachau 
My blog is still under review (The blog post is currently in moderation and is awaiting review) since last Seven days. Please help me to publish the same.

Published URL for this article

https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blog-posts-by-members/tan-based-exemption-functionality-in-sap-india-localization-complete-guide/ba-p/14406913
